description: Reynolds Consumer Products Inc. produces and sells products in cooking, serving, cleanup, and storage, and tableware product categories in the United States and internationally. The company operates through four segments: Reynolds Cooking & Baking, Hefty Waste & Storage, Hefty Tableware, and Presto Products. The Reynolds Cooking & Baking segment produces aluminum foil, disposable aluminum pans, parchment paper, freezer paper, wax paper, butcher paper, plastic wrap, baking cups, oven bags, and slow cooker liners under the Reynolds Wrap, Reynolds Kitchens, and EZ Foil brands in the United States
